programme.desc: Sanjay grows giant calf muscles and joins a peculiar police force. Craig risks his life to help his best bud find a frozen treasure.

programme.title: The Loud House S2 Ep. 219
programme.desc: Tired of Lynn's poor sportsmanship when it comes to board games, the siblings decide to team up to take her down. When Mom and Dad meet a new accomplished family they worry that their kids aren't doing enough activities to ensure a successful future.

programme.title: Breadwinners S2 Ep. 215
programme.desc: A Crustmas Story: SwaySway and Buhdeuce stay up all night waiting for Santa Crust to come - while reading each other quazy holiday stories and singing Crustmas Carols.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tufflips hosts a spooky, strange and shoddy half-hour Halloween special.

programme.title: Breadwinners S2 Ep. 201
programme.desc: SwaySway and Buhdeuce babysit in 'Adventures in Big Baby Bun Sitting', and then in 'Crumbskull', the guys accidentally feed Ketta Dunce Bread just when her smartness is needed to save the planet.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S1 Ep. 17
programme.desc: When the kids eat candy that makes good things taste bad forever, they set out on a quest to find an antidote. A cool bass player who lives in an underground convenience store threatens to break up Sanjay and Craig's friendship.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Jimmy Neutron AU S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Jimmy creates a machine that zaps his intelligence away in order to fit in, while his missing brains are needed to stop a meteor aimed at Retroville. Jimmy builds a candy selling robot salesman who won't take no for an answer.

programme.title: Breadwinners S1 Ep. 101
programme.desc: SwaySway and Buhdeuce deliver bread to the bad part of Duck Town in 'Thug Loaf', and then in 'Mine All Mine', they meet the most righteous dude in the planet - the Bread Maker!

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 717
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy-winning producer and DJ, Diplo, joins Rob, Chanel, and Sterling save the day with "Peacekeepers," get crazy with "Mad Indecent Block Parties,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 812
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling spot some "Man Dolphins", hit some red "Bullseyes" and get wet in the category "Dammmmp Daniel."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 11
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel celebrate the holiday season by fighting through BLACK AND BLUE FRIDAY, GETTIN' UGLY with Christmas sweaters, and spinning some HUMAN DREIDELS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 809
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo fly solo as they learn how dangerous it is to be born with "Turtle Blood", get in shape with "Beast 90x" and learn the advantages to being 100% "Prank Proof".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 16
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo choke down some STREET MEAT, party with a few SLITER SISTERS and hit the stairs with some extreme SLINKIES.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 724
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling have rapper/producer Sage the Gemini on the show to find out if he's "Glide Or Die," get "Over Gassed," and announce to the world "I Love Sparks!"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 821
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, comedy icon Wanda Sykes joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to talk about what it means to have "Unpresidential Nipples," doling out "Momforcement," and the first-ever "Wandamania."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 810
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy-nominated recording artist Redfoo joins Rob, Stee-Lo and Chanel to talk about the " Legends Of Campfoo", going "Lights Out" and learn what it means to get "Party Rock'd".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 21
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Young M.A joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to talk about people who have HOT SAUCE, the meaning of RED LYFE, and the joy of CASH BATHS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 10
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, motivational speaker Michael Crossland joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to teach us the CROSSLAND METHOD, show us what it means when your dog is CROSS-BRED, and visit the FIELD OF NIGHTMARES.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 716
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling and Chanel try out some "Competitive Sleeping," experience the confusion of "Creature Shock" and go too hard on a "Sunday Doneday."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 15
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, hip hop star Vic Mensa joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to check out some close calls in STILL ALIVE, learn creative ways to SAVE MORE MONEY and get extra strange with A LOT GOING ON.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 17
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, singer-songwriter Jessie J joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel to learn how to DO IT LIKE A DUDE, hear some harsh truths in MOM-SPLAINING and watch the bodies slam in BANG BANG.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Music producer Clinton Sparks teaches Rob, Chanel, and Steelo how to make budget beats with SPARKS OF GENIUS, get cultured with some MASSHOLES, and cause some serious mom damage with MAMA TRAUMA.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 4
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, hip hop and R&B singer Ty Dolla $ign joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel to check out some SIDE SHOWS, do a little NECK PREP, and find the hottest PORTA-PARTIES.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 27
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, we celebrate the world of NASCAR, with a salute to PASS MASTERS, an introduction to NASCAR EXITS, and a look at what happens when people get PAVEMENTAL.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 3
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo celebrate a RUSSIAN THANKSGIVING, feel the wrath of some TEENY MEANIES and plug in with VIRTUAL RETIREMENT.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 815
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy-winning rapper and producer T-Pain joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to sweeten the sound of people's slams in "T-Pain Your Pain", talk about "Hard 180s"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 15
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy nominated singer-songwriter and actress Christina Milian joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to be amazed by some SUPERHUMANS, give some restaurants an F-RATING, and be terrorized by some FEATHER SHARKS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 828
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob shows Chanel and Sterling the animal mastery of "Beast Lords," the tragedy of having a "Craptastrophe" and the dangers of flying "Foot Bombs."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 818
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling see the secret skills it takes to be an "Undercover Badass," find a new way of "Gettin' Paid" and learn that some things are simply "Unforgivable."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 729
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined by pop singer Zara Larsson to go "Beast Catching," shed some "Beyonce Tears," and sing along to the "Worstest Love Of All."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 6
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo attend some BRO BURIALS, hang with a crew of LIL' TRUNKIES and teach us a new trend called SPEED BUMPING.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 9
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness Stranger Things actor Gaten Matarazzo joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo for a terrifying special episode as they witness PURE TERROR, get a TASTE OF THE GRAVE and try to avoid the DEMOGORGONS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 28
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel are joined by country musician Wheeler Walker, Jr. to discuss his BANNED MATES, analyze grooming techniques in MUFF MAINTENANCE, and explore the embarrassment of PREMATURE RELEASES.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 18
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo take a vacation to LAKE PAINATONKA, catch the quick hands in GRABBIES and watch some unsuspecting people get EFFED FROM BEHIND.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 726
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling welcome model Ireland Baldwin to celebrate some "Bald Wins," run afoul of some "Trash Horses" and learn the difficulties of having "Outside Deficit Disorder."

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 711
programme.desc: Casa Bonita: Cartman is overjoyed at going to a Mexican restaurant for Kyle's birthday but is crushed when he finds out Butters is invited instead. He'll have to make Butters "disappear". (S7, E11)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 712
programme.desc: All About The Mormons: A new family moves to South Park and their son Gary is an unusually perfect Mormon - this angers the boys no end! Will Stan beat him up or go for a family dinner?! (S7, E12)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 713
programme.desc: Butt Out: When the boys' smoking leads to a nasty incident, it's the cigarettes that are blamed rather than them. Cue the glutinous Rob Reiner to arrive in town with his anti-smoking lobby! (S7, E13)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 714
programme.desc: Raisins: When Wendy breaks up with Stan he takes it hard. The boys decide to take him to the restaurant Raisins, where all of the employees are preteen girls who enjoy wearing heavy make-up. (S7, E14)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The children of South Park are attracted to "Mr. Jefferson," the new neighbor in town, and Cartman goes out of his way to get "Mr. Jefferson" to love him best.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A PETA protest against the use of a cow as South Park Elementary's mascot forces the student body to choose a new one.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: In order to save South Park, Stan and Kyle have to find a way to destroy the ever-expanding Wall-Mart superstore while keeping Cartman from stabbing them in the back.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 801
programme.desc: Good Times With Weapons: After buying martial arts weapons at a local flea market, the boys are transformed into anime Japanese Warriors, with dire consequences for poor Professor Chaos. (S8, E01)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 803
programme.desc: Up The Down Steroid: Jimmy is due to take part in the Special Olympics but what dodgy substance is he talked into taking? Cartman fakes being disabled so he can enter and win a $1,000. (S8, E02)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 804
programme.desc: The Passion of the Jew: After seeing 'The Passion of the Christ' a zealous Cartman taunts Kyle. When Stan and Kenny see it, they hate it and harass a crazed Mel Gibson for their money back! (S8, E03)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 805
programme.desc: You Got F'd in the A: The boys get 'served' by some kids from the O.C. so now 'it's on!'. Stan puts together a dance troupe who must compete in the dance-off. Will Randy's moves save them? (S8, E04)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 806
programme.desc: Goobacks: South Park is swamped by workers from the future, who take all the jobs for less pay. The men of South Park go to unusual lengths to stop them. "Dey turk err jurbs!" (S8, E07)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 810
programme.desc: Pre-School: The boys are pooping their pants after hearing that Trent, a notorious bully from their pre-school years, is being released from juvenile hall - guess who put him there? (S8, E10)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 811
programme.desc: Quest For Ratings: When the gang's school news programme trails far behind Craig's show, "Animals Close-Up With a Wide-Angle Lens", they pledge to boost their ratings - how far will they go? (S8, E11)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 812
programme.desc: Stupid Spoiled ***** Video Playset: Paris Hilton opens a store in South Park, corrupting the town's girls in the process. It's up to Mr Slave to put things right - time for a "***** off!" (S8, E12)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 813
programme.desc: Cartman's Incredible Gift: Cartman jumps off his roof while wearing cardboard wings and ends up in a coma. When he awakens he believes he has psychic powers - and the police believe it too! (S8, E13)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 814
programme.desc: Woodland Critter Christmas: Stan finds talking animals building a Christmas tree in the woods. They enlist him to protect them from an evil mountain lion but things aren't what they seem. (S8, E14)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When hippie drum circles start popping up in people's attics and backyards the citizens of South Park have no choice but to turn to Eric Cartman for help.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The boys set up a talent agency and pool all their resources and impress their first client only to have another agency steal him away.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 11
programme.desc: After the sudden on-set of the disease Gingervitis, Cartman rallies all other ginger kids to rise up and assume their role as the master race.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The boys try to rescue their new friend Willzyx, a talking space whale, from the Denver Sea Park, and with the help of MASA (Mexican Aeronautica y Spacia Administracion) get him home to the moon for $200.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 14

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Your favourites are back for another crack at the coveted MasterChef title. Up for grabs tonight is this season's only immunity pin and joining them all week is chef extraordinaire, Gordon Ramsay.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Each team must cook a three-course meal for 120 guests. The judges reveal three ingredients: black garlic, ginger and potatoes. Each team must feature one of the ingredients in each course.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Teams must cook a three-course meal in a relay style cook. Each team member starts a course and after 20 minutes must swap to the next course. The most cohesive menu with the best dishes wins.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 4
programme.desc: After impressing the judges in yesterday's round robin relay challenge, the winning team are back in the kitchen cooking for immunity and a chance to be safe from the next elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 5

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 6

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 21

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 22

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 26
programme.desc: With only 3 castaways left remaining, who will win the half a million dollar prize and the title of sole survivor?

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 606
programme.desc: With Charlotte returning from the Bush a new woman, the housemates lay down the law for Scotty, slapping him with a drinking ban hoping that he will stop smashing up the house. (S6, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 607
programme.desc: James and Gary come to blows which sends shockwaves through the house and Charlotte's heart strings are pulled for Gary as she offers him support. (S6 ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 608
programme.desc: As their time in Sydney comes to an end, the singles make it their mission to have a storming night in the Whitsundays. The coupled housemates have raised suspicions. Last in the series. (S6, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 701
programme.desc: The Geordies are back where they belong, in Newcastle, for a jaw-dropping summer season of partying, pulling, bucking, necking on and getting mortal. (S7, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 702
programme.desc: The Geordies are reeling from an explosive fallout following new girl Marnie's arrival. A night out ends with Scott completely losing his cool and trying to smash the house up. (S7, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 703
programme.desc: It is Holly's birthday, the Geordies celebrate as only they know how - with a mint house party. Meanwhile there's a tiny tragedy in the house, leading to an unexpected funeral on the beach. (S7, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 704
programme.desc: The house is rocked to the core as Charlotte and Holly have an explosive falling out with new girl Marnie. Scott and Gary's friendship is pushed to the limit. A former housemate returns. (S7, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 706
programme.desc: Gary and Holly are still furious at the way Charlotte's boyfriend treated her. Marnie decides she'll put out if Scott behaves himself. (S7, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 801
programme.desc: The Geordies are back in the Toon for more partying, necking on and getting mortal. Everyone's buzzin' as a new lad arrives to join the crew and Marnie promises to stay away from the boys. (S8, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 802
programme.desc: Gary gets jealous when Marnie flirts with new boy Aaron. Vicky returns to the house, and there's the first ever Tash-On Tours as the Geordies put their own spin on singles nights. (S8, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 803
programme.desc: Charlotte's back! And her arrival couldn't have come at a worse time. New lad Aaron wins a date with Holly after her challenge, but he reveals he's actually got a thing for Vicky. (S8, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 804
programme.desc: With Charlotte back in the house, all eyes are on Gary and Marnie and whether they'll decide to continue sleeping together. (S8, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 805
programme.desc: Things kick off in the house as Aaron hears Vicky and the girls slagging him off on the eve of his third date with Vicky. (S8,ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 806
programme.desc: New boy Kyle gets properly settled into the house by spending the night with Holly, and the Geordies take Tash on Tours international as they jet off to Reykjavik, Iceland for some partying. (S8, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 807
programme.desc: After checking out the local guys, girls and geysers in Iceland, the Geordies head back to the Toon, where it all kicks off as Aaron and Scott find out the truth about Gary and Marnie. (S8, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 410
programme.desc: After Mike's prank backfires, the guys visit Vinny's family in Sicily and the girls class it up on a Tuscan wine tour. Snooki learns the truth about her hook-up with Vin and must come clean to Jionni.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 411
programme.desc: Deena's still trying to 'do sex' with Pauly, the meatballs get an icy reception at a club, and the whole house turns on Mike after he stirs up drama one too many times. (S4, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 412
programme.desc: Mike's antics have proven too much and Ron demands he make amends. As the crew count down the days until their return to Seaside, Mike wonders whether or not to join them at the Shore. (S4, ep12)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 453
programme.desc: After a summer full of popping and breaking bottles, heartache, hookups, and car-crashing, wall-smashing drama, the cast reunite to open up old wounds and say goodbye to Florence.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 501
programme.desc: The roommates return from Italy and couldn't be more excited to get back to the Jersey Shore. But a drama storm is brewing as Mike threatens to destroy Snooki's relationship with Jionni. (S5, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 502
programme.desc: Vinny weighs his options: Should he stay, or head home to Staten Island? Snooki fights with Jionni, and the roommates are back to their usual antics - partying and tanning to the extreme. (S5, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 503
programme.desc: The roommates struggle to adjust to life at the Shore without Vinny, while Mike confronts his own internal demons. But it's also Pauly's birthday and he gets the best present of his life! (S5, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 504
programme.desc: Mike returns only to find out that Danny has threatened to get new roommates! The girls hire strippers for Pauly and Mike's wild birthday party whilst the roomies go to kidnap Vinny. (S5, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 505
programme.desc: Vinny returns and everyone celebrates. The Situation tries hard to be nice but ends up annoying the boys. Snooki struggles with an uncomfortable condition. (S5, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 506
programme.desc: The Situation secretly gathers information to bring down one of his roommates - and for once it isn't Snooki. JWOWW freaks out when Roger disappears and doesn't return her calls. (S5, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 507
programme.desc: One of the roommates cause drama with the Snooki and Deena, while Jenni's skimpy outfit creates a problem for Roger. A crazy night at Karma nightclub ends in a fight. (S5, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 508
programme.desc: The cast tries to avoid a shark attack when they go fishing. Jenni confronts Pauly's stalker. Snooki sets her sights on Vinny when her boyfriend rejects her affections. (S5, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 509
programme.desc: Mike decides he can wait no longer to reveal 'the truth' to Snooki's boyfriend. Pauly, Vinny, and Deena find it difficult to be the single roommates in the Shore House. (S5, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 510
programme.desc: A battle royale breaks out after Mike reveals to Jionni that he hooked up with Snooki. Some of the roommates go camping, while Vinny and Pauly pull the greatest prank in Shore history! (S5, ep10)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 511
programme.desc: As the roommates prepare to leave, Mike starts a rumour about Deena's sister. Pauly and Vinny prank the house, and the Storm of the Century hits the Shore. (S5, ep11)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 103
programme.desc: Charlotte's keen to put last week's drunken mistake behind her, but will Josh forgive her for locking lips with someone else? Meanwhile, Charlotte plans a surprise party for her Dad's 50th. (S1, ep3)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 102
programme.desc: Charlotte heads out to Australia with BFF Melissa. With the rules agreed, Charlotte is confident she can trust Josh while she's away, but on a night out she makes a terrible mistake. (S1, ep2)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 101
programme.desc: Charlotte hears news on social media that brings back painful memories. Focussing on the future, she turns her attention to new man Josh and trying to fix her relationship with BFF Melissa. (S1, ep1)

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 20
programme.desc: When Lauren and Heidi have a run-in, they put their feud aside and remember why they used to be friends. Spencer and Heidi deal with fallout of their elopment and Justin shocks Audrina when he whisks her away to Palm Springs.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Spencer and Heidi ignore the concerns of their families and runaway to Mexico to elope. Whitney takes a chance at a dream job in New York City and says goodbye to Lauren and her life in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Whitney gets offered a chance at her dream job in her New York. Lauren grows nostalgic when she learns her parents are selling their house in Laguna Beach, and Stephanie turns to Spencer for help with Cameron.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Audrina tries to save her friendship with Lauren after accusing her of hooking up with Justin. Spencer and Stephanie visit their grandmother who is fed up with their fighting.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Audrina believes a rumor she hears: that Lauren hooked up with Justin. Meanwhile Holly tries to get Heidi away from Spencer.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Lauren lets Heidi's sister crash at her place. Justin asks Audrina to go away for a romantic weekend, and Heidi's frustration with Spencer grows after she has to beg for her job back.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Whitney travels to New York expecting to reconnect with Alex, but a boy named Jay steals her away. Heidi is miserable after being fired, but when Spencer tries to get her old job back, he makes the situation much worse.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Audrina gets her own place, hoping Justin will move in with her but everyone fears she is moving for the wrong reason. Heidi invites Spencer to a work event and gets caught having a little too much fun.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Lauren tries to make peace between Brody and Stephanie. Audrina wants to make things work with Corey but Justin won't give up on her. Stephanie has doubts about her new boyfriend after he fails to stand up to Brody.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Lauren and Audrina travel to Cabo for Brody's birthday, but the party turns into a fight. Spencer humiliates Stephanie after learning that her new boyfriend is friends with Brody.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Audrina reconnects with an old flame Cory and finds herself juggling two guys. Spencer forces Heidi to kick her sister Holly out of the apartment.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Lauren gets a letter of apology from Heidi and realizes there's only one thing keeping them from being friends again. Audrina starts dating a new guy to make Justin jealous, but her plan backfires.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The truth finally comes out about Stephanie's relationship with Lauren's ex-boyfriend Doug. Heidi's mother makes a surprise visit to LA and has a confrontation with Spencer.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Lauren leaves for family vacation, and things in Los Angeles go awry. Stephanie dates Doug behind Lauren's back, and Audrina gets friendly with Heidi.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Heidi's sister Holly reaches out to Lauren, forcing both Lauren and Heidi to reconsider what happened to their friendship. Audrina and Justin's relationship is tested as she works a huge event for Epic Records.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Lauren and Audrina fight to save their friendship, but it might be too late. Spencer's had enough of Heidi's sister Holly and takes matters into his own hands. And Brody and Doug get out of jail with a story to tell.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: A blowout trip to Vegas breaks down when Audrina snubs Lauren, Brody brings up Stephanie's past, and the boys end up in jail.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Lauren realizes that the chemistry she felt for Doug may no longer be there, Whitney is nervous about heading to New York and finds herself on a date with a male model, Spencer tries to cut Stephanie out of his life.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lauren runs into Spencer at Stephanie's birthday, Kelly Cutrone fires someone at People's Revolution and Whitney has to step up to fill the void, and Lauren's relationship with Doug may be moving a little too fast.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Lauren and Lo throw Audrina a birthday party, Lauren tries to make a good impression on a new boy, and a visit from Heidi's sister Holly threatens Spencer and Heidi's relationship.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 28
programme.desc: In the season finale, Audrina feels shut out by Lauren's close friendship with Lo, and wants to move out. Lauren makes a heartfelt attempt to patch things up with Audrina, but it may be too late.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 27
programme.desc: Lauren is caught between friends, as tension between Lo and Audrina builds.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 26
programme.desc: An old romance is rekindled when Stephen Colletti reenters Lauren's life.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 25
programme.desc: With Spencer out of the picture, Heidi makes a last attempt to regain Lauren's friendship.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Tim White, the Chancellor of the University of California, Riverside, is put to the test when his role as a teaching assistant is graded by over 200 chemistry students. Later, his physical aptitude is under exam while working with the track team.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The chairman and CEO of Diamond Resorts International, one of the largest timeshare companies in the world, ignites a fire on a dangerous assignment and breaks his cover at a job site.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Dina Dwyer-Owens, Chairman and CEO of the Dwyer Group, embarks on a grueling undercover experience where she works as a plumber, hauls water heaters, fixes ovens and works alongside a grounds crew.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Rick Tigner, President of Kendall-Jackson Wine Estates, causes a shutdown when he struggles to maintain pace on a bottling line, and is shocked by comments made by a delivery driver.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Rick Silva, President and CEO of Checkers & Rally's, one of the nation's largest fast food chains, travels to the front lines of his industry, where he's forced to make a drastic decision regarding one of his restaurants.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Bernt Bodal, CEO of American Seafoods, one of the largest seafood companies in the U.S., realizes that despite his past experience as a deckhand, he's not prepared to return to the tough work and dangers involved in a day's work on a fishing vessel.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Lynne Zappone, Chief Talent Officer of Popeyes Louisiana Kitchen, the world's second-largest fried chicken restaurant chain, is frustrated with an employee's lack of Southern charm behind the counter.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Sam Taylor, CEO of Oriental Trading Company, is concerned when he discovers some of his employees aren't happy. Meanwhile, the Boss causes an unintentional shutdown in his plant when he's tasked with managing the assembly line.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Harlan Kent, President and CEO of Yankee Candle, the leading designer, manufacturer, wholesaler and retailer of premium scented candles, goes undercover where his customer service skills leave several co-workers questioning his true identity.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Mark King, President and CEO of TaylorMade Golf Company, the largest manufacturer of golf equipment and apparel in the world, is forced to break cover when an employee grows suspicious of her new trainee.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Chad Hallock, CEO and Co-Founder of Budget Blinds, the largest window coverings franchise in North America with more than 800 franchise locations, takes it personally when two separate franchisees criticize his advertising plan.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Dan DiZio, CEO and Co-Founder of the Philly Pretzel Factory, which sells over 100 million pretzels a year throughout its 120 stores, is forced into action after one franchisee goes rogue.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Catherine Monson, CEO of FASTSIGNS International, who has never designed or installed one of their signs, finds herself plagued by air bubbles while trying to affix large decal signs, and is also forced to conquer her fear of heights.

When Allie and the Royal Prince hit it off, it seems he might be in the market for more than just a terrific cake. But will the sneaky Marilyn let Allie get it all: the gig and the prince? Of course not.

programme.desc: Squidward gets hurt & threatens legal action unless Mr. Krabs caters to him hand and foot. Later, Mr. Krabs & Plankton finally agree, when the popular Flabby Patty threatens to steal their customers.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S8 Ep. 25
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs wants all of Bikini Bottom to eat at the Krusty Krab. Later, Mr. Krabs and Plankton circulate petitions to see which restaurant will get bulldozed by the city.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S8 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs tries to make even more money by turning a hole in the Krusty Krab wall into a drive-thru window. Tony Fast Jr., the son of a famous race car driver, tries to teach SpongeBob how to drive.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S8 Ep. 26
programme.desc: A concert promoter wants to send SpongeBob and Squidward on the road, until greedy Mr. Krabs decides to manage them - and their world tour - himself.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S8 Ep. 3
programme.desc: SpongeBob & Patrick turn SpongeBob's house into an indoor miniature golf course! When SpongeBob realises how many memories are attached to all of his possessions, he is reluctant to throw anything way

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 179
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to join the extreme sports team The Drasticals // Sandy finds a book of world records and tries to break them all!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S8 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Everyone in Bikini Bottom is competing in a worm-sled race to the South Pole. Will SpongeBob and the gang make it to the frosty finish line to claim the big prize...one million clams!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 180
programme.desc: Patrick becomes a superhero // Gary becomes obsessed with his new red ball, forcing SpongeBob to take drastic measures to intervene.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S8 Ep. 5
programme.desc: When Pat suddenly grows a very grown-up beard, he decides it's time to act like a grown-up, too. While preparing to give a report for boating school, SpongeBob realises that heâ€™s got stage fright.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Merry Wishmas!: When Timmy doesn’t get what he wants for Christmas he simply wishes for it. But his friends can’t do the same, so Timmy wishes every kid could get a magical coupon that would allow them to wish for the one thing they didn't get.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Cat ‘n Mouse/Chip off the Old Crock: Timmy and Chloe have to help a depressed Catman prove to his girlfriend that he’s a real superhero. Mr. Crocker teaches his nephew to be a FAIRY catcher.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 54
programme.desc: Grandpa's Birthday/Road Trip: Grandpa thinks he's going to die soon because no one in his family ever made it past his age. He prepares to die, and Arnold tries to convince him that life is still worth living.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 49
programme.desc: All the kids are paired with adults with interesting jobs except Arnold, who is forced to spend time with the Jolly Olly Man. / Harold believes it's his life's calling to become a butcher, but he slowly drives Mr. Greene, the butcher, crazy.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Door 16/Arnold as Cupid: The boarders are all suspicious of the mysterious Mr. Smith who lives behind door 16. /Oscar Kokoshka moves in with Arnold when his wife, Susie, throws him out of their apartment following another fight.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 44
programme.desc: Arnold seeks out his favorite author who turns out to be quite opposite of her sweet and sentimental books. / A rich kid joins Arnold's class. Arnold and the gang tell him what life in the big city is really like.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Arnold has trouble with the basketball coach and his favored son until he teaches them both a lesson in Zen as well as the meaning of teamwork./Arnold becomes friend with "cool" Frankie G., but his new friend only succeeds in getting him into trouble.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S2 Ep. 35
programme.desc: Helga's Love Potion/Gerald's Secret: Helga experiences a day free of her love/hate obsessionGerald reveals he can't ride a bike and Arnold helps him overcome his fear and humiliation.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 70
programme.desc: When Arnold and Grandpa get into a fender bender with Helga and Big Bob, the typical argument of who's at fault ensues. After a confrontation at PS 118 between Rhonda and Patty, they both end up at the same finishing school.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Birthday bashed/Momnipresent: Timmy is excited for his birthday until he realizes that one year older means one year closer to losing his fairies. He spends the entire day trying to thwart all party plans, leading his Mom and Dad to think he's gone crazy!

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Whittle Me This/Mayor May Not: Catman thinks Timmy has been kidnapped. He mistakes Chloe for Catgirl and enlists her help to save Timmy. Timmy wishes Dad was Mayor, but Timmy gets tortured by the paparazzi and risks having his fairies discovered.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Arnold and Gerald are invited to a school dance by Connie and Maria; a pair of 6th grade "older women"./Arnold and Gerald manage to scrape up enough money for cheap seats at the last baseball game of Mickey Kaline - Arnold's idol.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Sooper Poof: Poof is trying to get the hang of shape shifting – unfortunately he takes after Cosmo! Timmy’s been running Cosmo and Wanda ragged so Jorgen takes him to "Wishing Well."

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Fairly OddPet: When Timmy realizes that everyone in Dimmsdale has a pet except him, he adopts Sparky, a mischievous fairy dog. But owning a fairy dog proves to be a much bigger challenge than Timmy could have ever predicted.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The Beavers trick-or-treat the scary house on the hill. It turns out to be the home of their B-movie star hero, Oxnard Montalvo.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When Treeflower re-enters Norbert's life he expects their love to blossom once more.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The List/The Haunted Train: Arnold's best-laid plans for the "ultimate Saturday" go up in smoke when he tries to complete all of his favorite things to do in one afternoon./On a boring summer night Grandpa tries to liven things up by telling a story.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Clark Laser/Married to the Mom: When Timmy and Chloe save Dark Laser’s beloved pet, Flipsie, Dark Laser becomes bound to them as their bodyguard. Timmy and Chloe wish up a girlfriend for Mr. Crocker to get him off their backs.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Norbert falls under the influence of slimy pond scum and becomes possessed by the spirit of un-goodliness.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S2 Ep. 32
programme.desc: The Longest Monday/Eugene's Pet: AKA - Trash Can Day, Arnold and Gerald must get through the traditional day of hazing 4th graders./After Eugene's pet fish is accidentally killed by Arnold's yo-yo, Arnold vows to get unlucky Eugene a pet that will endure.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Turner & Pooch/Dumbbell Curve: Crocker seeks out a new source of magic from Timmy’s house. Realizing it’s Sparky, Crocker tries to turn him against Timmy. Crocker grades on a bell curve so Timmy wishes everyone was dumber than him.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 68
programme.desc: Arnold goes all out to win Lila's affection by taking her to the Annual Cheese Festival. Harold feels that he has gotten too fat, so he gets his parents to send him on a weight-off cruise.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S8 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Timmy makes his millionth wish so all of Fairyworld has gathered to celebrate. After seeing all the wishes he has made, the Fairy Council thinks he should be put on trial for being the worst godkid ever.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Stage Fright/Gone Flushin': Vicky decides to be an actress and makes Timmy help her land her first role. Dad accidentally flushes Timmy and the fairies down the toilet.

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When Otto gets the group kicked out of Madtown, Reggie's birthday party plans are ruined. Sam and Twister have to go to Junior Lifeguard class, Reggie and Otto think their friends are sea weenies.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Dad decides to convert the Turner home into a farm. Unfortunately, it takes Cosmo and Wanda’s magic to give Dad a green thumb, and when they’re swept away by a tornado, it’s up to Timmy to save the farm...and his fairies!

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: The whole gang has gathered at Drake and Josh's house before Drake's big concert, but thanks to Walter's poor weather predictions they end up stuck in the house due to severe rain.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: When a video of Babe dancing to Dub's new music video goes viral, Dub challenges Babe to a dance battle to prove he's the better dancer.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Logan brings Carlos along to the MCAT test as his good luck charm, but when Carlos somehow gets a higher score, Logan questions his plans to become a doctor.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Josh gets a student teaching job in Miranda's classroom, and Drake potentially discovers his new drummer.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The guys want to go camping, but Gustavo nixes the idea because it’s dangerous. Instead they use their connections to camp on a sound stage, but things go awry as the guys try to show off their roughing it skills.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Josh's long time e-pal Yooka decides to visit from Yudonia, but a Yudonian "Friendship Ceremony" turns out to be a Yudonian wedding!

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 201
programme.desc: Babe blows the entire Game Shakers ad budget on a high-tech bus bench, only to find out the bench is a magnet for low-lifes and weirdos.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 209
programme.desc: After an online story about Game Shakers snubs Kenzie, she and Babe get in a fight. Upset, Kenzie takes a job as a waitress at a coffee shop and Babe has to try and get her back to Game Shakers.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Spending all their time together since moving to LA has given guys cabin fever, so they decide to spend some time apart.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 304
programme.desc: Kenzie's dating app causes huge problems for Babe.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Kendall, James, Logan and Carlos are hockey playing best friends from Minnesota, whose lives are turned upside down after mega-record producer discovers them and moves them to Los Angeles to make them into the next big boy band.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Gustavo gets a spiritual guru to help with his anger issues, but when the guru talks Gustavo into letting him run Rocque Records, the boys must do whatever it takes to get back control of Big Time Rush.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Kendall and Logan volunteer at a dog shelter and end up adopting 12 dogs, but a sneaky heath inspector is on to them. Carlos and Jennifer’s puppy love is sickening and it’s up to James and the other Jennifers to rescue them.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: The guys get to hang out at Griffin’s beach house for day and invite the Palm Woods kids along. Carlos and Logan hunt for buried treasure, and James falls for a pretty girl who he suspects is a mermaid.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Helen enlists the aide of Drake and Josh after laser eye surgery leaves her temporarily blinded. When they lose Helen after taking advantage of her many at-home amenities, they are forced to ask themselves, who's the blind one in this situation?

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 312
programme.desc: Babe and Kenzie try to locate a cute boy who waved to Kenzie on the subway while Hudson and Trip become obsessed with a model doll house.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 16
programme.desc: When Drake and Josh decide to turn the tables and prank little Megan, she has the whole family believing that aliens are coming.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: James continues his pursuit of Lucy and buys a motorcycle in order to impress her, but he doesn’t know how to drive it. Kendall teaches Jo how to drive stick-shift, and Carlos & Logan can’t relinquish a childhood treasure.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Kendall and Logan must take care of Rocque Records' newest artist – an out-of-it rock legend until his induction into the Rock & Roll Hall of Fame that night. James and Carlos are stuck babysitting Katie.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 14
programme.desc: After the boys get in trouble for using Fake ID's Audrey and Walter fear they will fall to a life of crime and sign them up for a "Steered Straight" program, but things start skidding out-of-control when a real criminal befriends them

programme.title: Drake and Josh S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Drake convinces Josh that in order to become cooler he must try out for the football team.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When Drake and Josh mistakenly assume that Walter's suspicious behavior means that he is having an affair, they decide to take matters into their own hands, but ultimately end up cheating only themselves.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 15
programme.desc: The kids at the Palm Woods are organizing their first school dance and the boys of Big Time Rush have secured the perfect location, Gustavo's recording studio.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 218
programme.desc: When Dub and the Game Shakers swap dummies - Bunny for Hudson - The Game Shakers quickly regret it and have to figure out how to get Hudson back.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 311
programme.desc: The Game Shakers go to Wet Willy's Wild Water Park on its last day to try and break the speed record on the extremely dangerous water slide, the Big Ripper.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 24
programme.desc: BTR refuses to record their second album after Gustavo is too hard on them, and the strike pits the determined band against their stubborn producer in a battle of wills.
